A.evidence: Mostly faithful prose and order, but title/OCR glitches like 'b y' and 'no toriously'; Algorithm 1 is reduced to a broken array/input stub, while most displayed equations before it are usable.

B.evidence: Clean prose and Algorithm 1 is structurally complete, but section 2 heading is missing and some gradient equations are wrong/sign-lost near the chain rule.

C.evidence: Starts with right-column text before Abstract/Introduction, many equations and Algorithm 1 are replaced by '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->', and math symbols are often OCR gibberish like '/lscript'.

D.evidence: Prose is mostly present but Christian Szegedy is inserted mid-introduction, OCR errors appear ('Simodaira'), and Algorithm 1 is malformed with the mean step missing and variance duplicated.
